channel.title: Penetration-Testing on jkt's blogs
channel.description: Recent content in Penetration-Testing on jkt's blogs

item.title: Dissecting HackTheBox Pro Labs: The Art of Attacking Enterprise Networks
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A comprehensive review of HTB Pro Labs — POO, Dante, Zephyr, and Offshore — with key takeaways, practical tips, and honest insights.

item.title: TryHackMe Offensive PenTesting Pathway — Full Review
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A full breakdown of the TryHackMe Offensive PenTesting path — sections, deliverables, and practical tips.

item.title: TryHackMe CompTIA PenTest+ Pathway — Full Review
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A full breakdown of the TryHackMe CompTIA PenTest+ path — planning, tools, recon, and exploitation.
